users.create_table:
CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  permissions TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  preferences JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_login TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT chk_username_length CHECK (LENGTH(username) >= 3 AND LENGTH(username) <= 50);
ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT chk_email_format CHECK (email ~* '^[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Za-z]{2,}$');

devices.create_table:
CREATE TABLE devices (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  device_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  device_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  device_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (device_type IN ('desktop', 'mobile', 'widget', 'ide')),
  platform VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (platform IN ('windows', 'macos', 'linux', 'ios', 'android')),
  last_seen TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
);

access_tokens.create_table:
CREATE TABLE access_tokens (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  device_id UUID REFERENCES devices(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  token_jti VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  revoked_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  is_revoked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

refresh_tokens.create_table:
CREATE TABLE refresh_tokens (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  device_id UUID REFERENCES devices(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  token_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  revoked_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  is_revoked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  rotated_from UUID REFERENCES refresh_tokens(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

workflows.create_table:
CREATE TABLE workflows (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled')),
  priority INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 5 CHECK (priority >= 1 AND priority <= 10),
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
  droid_assigned VARCHAR(100),
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  execution_time FLOAT,
  parameters JSONB,
  result JSONB,
  error TEXT
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE workflows ADD CONSTRAINT chk_name_length CHECK (LENGTH(name) >= 3 AND LENGTH(name) <= 100);

workflow_steps.create_table:
CREATE TABLE workflow_steps (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  workflow_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES workflows(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  step_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'skipped')),
  "order" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  parameters JSONB NOT NULL,
  started_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  execution_time FLOAT,
  error TEXT,
  result JSONB,
  UNIQUE(workflow_id, step_id),
  UNIQUE(workflow_id, "order")
);

workflow_logs.create_table:
CREATE TABLE workflow_logs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  workflow_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES workflows(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  step_id UUID REFERENCES workflow_steps(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  level VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (level IN ('info', 'warning', 'error', 'debug')),
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  metadata JSONB
);

conversations.create_table:
CREATE TABLE conversations (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title VARCHAR(200),
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_message_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  message_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  is_archived BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

chat_messages.create_table:
CREATE TABLE chat_messages (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  conversation_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  role VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('user', 'assistant', 'system')),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  metadata JSONB,
  parent_message_id UUID REFERENCES chat_messages(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  is_edited BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  edited_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE chat_messages ADD CONSTRAINT chk_content_length CHECK (LENGTH(content) <= 100000);

r5_entries.create_table:
CREATE TABLE r5_entries (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  session_id UUID REFERENCES r5_sessions(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  entry_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  category VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  patterns TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  metadata JSONB,
  source VARCHAR(255),
  relevance_score FLOAT CHECK (relevance_score >= 0.0 AND relevance_score <= 1.0)
);
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_r5_entries_tags ON r5_entries USING GIN(tags);
constraints: ALTER TABLE r5_entries ADD CONSTRAINT chk_content_length CHECK (LENGTH(content) <= 100000);

r5_patterns.create_table:
CREATE TABLE r5_patterns (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  pattern_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  frequency INTEGER DEFAULT 0 CHECK (frequency >= 0),
  first_seen TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_seen TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  categories TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  related_patterns TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  metadata JSONB
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE r5_patterns ADD CONSTRAINT chk_last_seen_after_first_seen CHECK (last_seen >= first_seen);

r5_pattern_occurrences.create_table:
CREATE TABLE r5_pattern_occurrences (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  pattern_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES r5_patterns(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  entry_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES r5_entries(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  context TEXT,
  timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  confidence FLOAT CHECK (confidence >= 0.0 AND confidence <= 1.0)
);

helpdesk_tickets.create_table:
CREATE TABLE helpdesk_tickets (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  ticket_id VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL CHECK (ticket_id ~ '^T[0-9]{9}$'),
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open' CHECK (status IN ('open', 'in_progress', 'resolved', 'closed')),
  priority VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium' CHECK (priority IN ('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical')),
  created_by UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
  assigned_to UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  droid_assigned VARCHAR(100),
  workflow_id UUID REFERENCES workflows(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  closed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}'
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE helpdesk_tickets ADD CONSTRAINT chk_description_length CHECK (LENGTH(description) <= 5000);

helpdesk_comments.create_table:
CREATE TABLE helpdesk_comments (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  ticket_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES helpdesk_tickets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  is_internal BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  attachments TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}'
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE helpdesk_comments ADD CONSTRAINT chk_content_length CHECK (LENGTH(content) <= 5000);

droids.create_table:
CREATE TABLE droids (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  droid_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('C-3PO', 'R2-D2', 'K-2SO', '2-1B', 'IG-88', 'Mouse Droid', 'R5-D4', 'Marvin')),
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'available' CHECK (status IN ('available', 'busy', 'offline')),
  current_workflows INTEGER DEFAULT 0 CHECK (current_workflows >= 0),
  queue_length INTEGER DEFAULT 0 CHECK (queue_length >= 0),
  total_workflows_processed INTEGER DEFAULT 0 CHECK (total_workflows_processed >= 0),
  success_rate FLOAT DEFAULT 1.0 CHECK (success_rate >= 0.0 AND success_rate <= 1.0),
  average_processing_time FLOAT DEFAULT 0 CHECK (average_processing_time >= 0),
  last_active TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  capabilities TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  metadata JSONB
);

intelligence_items.create_table:
CREATE TABLE intelligence_items (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('escalation', 'alert', 'insight', 'recommendation')),
  priority VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium' CHECK (priority IN ('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical')),
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  source VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  action_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  acknowledged_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  acknowledged_by UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  metadata JSONB,
  related_workflow_id UUID REFERENCES workflows(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  related_ticket_id UUID REFERENCES helpdesk_tickets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE intelligence_items ADD CONSTRAINT chk_message_length CHECK (LENGTH(message) <= 5000);

escalations.create_table:
CREATE TABLE escalations (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  escalation_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'acknowledged', 'resolved')),
  priority VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium' CHECK (priority IN ('low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical')),
  source VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  acknowledged_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
  acknowledged_by UUID REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  context JSONB,
  workflow_id UUID REFERENCES workflows(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  ticket_id UUID REFERENCES helpdesk_tickets(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
constraints: ALTER TABLE escalations ADD CONSTRAINT chk_message_length CHECK (LENGTH(message) <= 5000);

system_components.create_table:
CREATE TABLE system_components (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  component_name VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('operational', 'degraded', 'down')),
  version VARCHAR(50),
  last_updated TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  health_check_url VARCHAR(500),
  metadata JSONB
);

health_checks.create_table:
CREATE TABLE health_checks (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  check_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (status IN ('healthy', 'unhealthy')),
  timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  response_time FLOAT CHECK (response_time >= 0),
  error TEXT,
  metadata JSONB
);

initial.rollback: DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;
